title: How protein blend and veg collagen peptide is creating a new category in India's nutrition industry
description: New Delhi, June 2026 – India's sports nutrition industry is evolving beyond conventional protein supplementation. Consumers today are increasingly looking for products that align with broader wellness goals rather than focusing solely on muscle growth. As awareness around recovery, active lifestyles, and long-term health continues to grow, demand is rising for formulations that deliver multiple benefits through a single product. This shift in consumer behavior is creating opportunities for innovation, encouraging brands to rethink traditional supplementation. Recognizing this shift, Proathlix developed Protein Blend & Veg Collagen Peptide, a formulation that reflects the growing demand for more comprehensive approaches to nutrition and wellness.The Idea That Inspired Protein Blend & Veg Collagen PeptideFounded in 2017, Proathlix has focused on developing science-backed sports nutrition products for India's growing fitness community. As the market matured, the brand observed that most protein supplements were designed around a single objective—meeting daily protein requirements. However, consumers were becoming increasingly aware of the importance of recovery, consistency, and overall wellness. Recognizing this shift, Proathlix set out to create a formulation that could offer more than conventional protein supplementation. This vision ultimately led to the development of Protein Blend & Veg Collagen Peptide.Identifying a Gap in the MarketIndia's protein supplement market offers consumers a wide variety of choices, ranging from whey concentrates and isolates to plant-based alternatives. Yet most products continue to rely on one or two primary protein sources, with formulations largely focused on meeting basic protein requirements. While these products serve specific nutritional purposes, they often fail to address the broader needs of individuals pursuing active lifestyles.Modern consumers are no longer evaluating supplements based solely on protein content. They are increasingly interested in ingredient quality, digestibility, recovery support, sustained nutrition, and overall wellness benefits. This shift in expectations highlighted an opportunity for a more comprehensive approach to supplementation. Rather than depending on a single protein source, there was growing potential for a formulation that could combine multiple protein sources with complementary ingredients. The gap in the market was not simply about protein intake but about nutritional completeness. This thinking ultimately led to the development of Protein Blend & Veg Collagen Peptide, a formulation that brings together nine protein sources within a single nutritional solution designed to support the evolving needs of today's consumers.The Limitations of Traditional Protein SupplementationConventional protein supplements are typically formulated to deliver amino acids that support muscle repair and growth. While effective for this purpose, many products are designed with a narrow nutritional focus. As fitness culture expands beyond competitive bodybuilding and professional sports, consumers are beginning to expect more from their daily supplementation routines.Athletes, working professionals, and fitness enthusiasts often seek nutritional products that fit into a holistic wellness strategy. Recovery, sustained nutrition, and everyday physical resilience have become increasingly important considerations. This changing landscape has encouraged innovation within the industry and highlighted the need for formulations that go beyond traditional protein delivery.The Science Behind the FormulationThe development of Protein Blend & Veg Collagen Peptide was guided by a simple observation: consumers are increasingly seeking nutritional solutions that offer more than a single functional benefit. As awareness around recovery, consistency, and long-term wellness grows, the industry is witnessing a shift from single-purpose supplements toward more comprehensive formulations.Built around the concept of nutritional diversity, Protein Blend & Veg Collagen Peptide combines nine protein sources with veg collagen peptides to support the evolving needs of modern consumers. By bringing together different forms of protein within a single formulation, the product reflects a broader movement in functional nutrition—one that prioritizes sustained nutritional support, convenience, and a more holistic approach to wellness.The Rise of Multifunctional NutritionConsumer expectations from nutritional products have evolved significantly over the past decade. Today's fitness enthusiasts are increasingly looking for products that fit into broader wellness routines rather than addressing a single objective. Recovery, mobility, sustained energy, and overall physical well-being are becoming equally important considerations alongside muscle growth and performance.This shift is encouraging innovation across the industry and creating demand for formulations that can deliver multiple benefits within a single product. As a result, multifunctional nutrition is emerging as one of the most significant trends shaping the future of sports supplementation.Market Opportunity and the Future of Functional NutritionIndia's health and wellness sector continues to experience strong growth, driven by increasing fitness awareness, preventive health practices, and changing lifestyle priorities. Consumers are becoming more informed about nutrition and increasingly willing to invest in products that align with long-term wellness goals. This trend is being supported by rising health awareness, growing participation in fitness activities, and a stronger focus on preventive wellness across consumer segments.As the industry evolves, products that combine performance nutrition with broader wellness benefits are expected to gain greater attention. Through Protein Blend & Veg Collagen Peptide, Proathlix aims to contribute to this shift with a formulation that reflects changing consumer expectations. The growing interest in comprehensive nutritional solutions suggests that the future of supplementation may be defined not by single-purpose products, but by integrated formulations designed for modern lifestyles.Yuvraj Bali, Founder of Proathlix, explains the vision behind the formulation: "We observed that consumers were no longer evaluating supplements solely on protein content. Their expectations had evolved toward solutions that could support performance, recovery, and overall wellness within a single routine. Protein Blend & Veg Collagen Peptide was developed from that understanding and our belief that the future of nutrition will be shaped by greater nutritional diversity and functionality.”As consumer expectations continue to evolve, the nutrition industry is likely to witness greater innovation around multifunctional formulations. Products that combine performance-focused nutrition with broader wellness support may play an increasingly important role in shaping the future of supplementation in India.The pages slugged ‘Brand Connect’ are equivalent to advertisements and are not written and produced by Forbes India journalists.

title: Canada Makes World Cup History While the USMNT Faces Knockout Pressure + FOX's $50K World Cup Fans
description: Canada made history by winning its first-ever FIFA World Cup knockout match, and we break down whether Jesse Marsch's squad has what it takes to keep its Cinderella run alive. We also discuss why the pressure has officially shifted to the USMNT, preview the biggest Round of 32 matchups, and sit down with FOX One's Chief World Cup Watcher to hear what it's like getting paid $50,000 to watch every World Cup game.
content: Subscribe to The CooligansApple Podcasts | Spotify | YouTubeCanada has officially made history. Christian Polanco and Alexis Guerreros react to Canada's first-ever World Cup knockout victory, debate whether Jesse Marsch has already exceeded expectations, and ask if this magical run can continue against the winner of Netherlands vs. Morocco. They also grade Marsch's tournament so far and discuss what this moment means for Canadian soccer moving forward.The pressure is now squarely on the USMNT. After cruising through the group stage, Christian and Alexis explain why none of that matters unless Mauricio Pochettino's side delivers in the knockout rounds. They break down the Americans' path through Bosnia and a potential quarterfinal showdown with either Belgium or Senegal, and discuss whether this is the moment the expectations become impossible to ignore. Plus, FOX One's Chief World Cup Watcher joins the show to reveal what it's really like getting paid $50,000 to watch every single World Cup match.To wrap up the show, the boys preview three massive Round of 32 clashes: Germany vs. Paraguay, Netherlands vs. Morocco, and Ivory Coast vs. Norway. Which favorites are in danger? Which underdogs are ready to shock the world? And who will keep their World Cup dreams alive? The knockout stage is officially here, and every match is must-watch soccer.Timestamps:(2:00) — Canada make history against South Africa(11:00) - USMNT feeling the pressure ahead of knockout round?(20:00) - FOX One Chief World Cup Watchers join The Cooligans(42:00) - Round of 32 Matchday previewCANADA-USMNT🖥️ Watch this full episode on YouTubeCheck out all episodes of The Cooligans the rest of the Yahoo Sports podcast family at https://apple.co/3zEuTQj or at yahoosports.tv

title: Can healthy Derrick Brown make bigger difference to Panthers' defense?
description: The NFL Network ranked Carolina's DL as the No. 90 best player in the league.
content:
Can healthy Derrick Brown make bigger difference to Panthers' defense?  originally appeared on The Sporting News.
                Add The Sporting News as a Preferred Source by clicking here.Reaching as high as he could during a 2025 highlight, Carolina Panthers defensive end Derrick Brown batted a pass by Los Angeles Rams quarterback Matthew StaffordOne drive after breaking Tom Brady's NFL record for delivering 28 consecutive touchdown passes, Stafford's fluttering pass was picked off by safety Nick Scott.In the fourth quarter, facing a third-and-five play from the Panthers' 22-yard line, Brown worked his way into the backfield and executed a strip-sack, helping the Panthers clinch a 31-28 victory at Bank of America Stadium. The Week 13 win helped propel the franchise into the playoffs for the first time since 2017, despite an 8-9 mark.Brown makes a difference.A big difference. During its annual ranking of the league's top 100 players, the NFL Network placed Brown at No. 90. Teammate Bryce Young earlier earned a No. 98 rating. Panthers' players feel Derrick Brown's on-field presence One of the NFL's top run defenders, Brown's presence lifted the Panthers from a historically poor defensive ranking in 2024 to the NFC South championship last season.Coming off a record-setting season in 2023, Brown suffered a knee injury during the first half of the '24 regular-season opener. The Pro Bower became the first major contributor to be sidelined. He certainly wasn't alone. By the end of the injury-plagued campaign, at least seven top defenders dropped out. By Week 17, the 3-4 base unit was manned by mostly third- and fourth-stringers. The Panthers yielded a league-worst 6,877 total yards and 534 points, the most in league history.The Panthers also ranked No. 32 in rushing yards allowed (3,057) and posted the third-fewest sacks (29).When Brown returned last season, the Panthers surrendered 30 consecutive points in a season-opening loss to the New Orleans Saints. Brown remained confident, however."It’s going to be different,” Brown said, as reported by The Charlotte Post. “I can guarantee you that. We don’t want to harp on the past. Last year was what last year was, and then it’s time for us to move on from that, so I mean we’ve completely turned the chapter from that, and you can look for a more exciting defense, for sure, coming this fall.” He was right.Brown started all 17 games, finishing with 73 combined tackles, seven pass breakups and a team-high five sacks. With Brown and Jaycee Horn and Mike Jackson developing into one of the NFL's top cornerback duos, the Panthers improved to 15th in scoring defense, yielding 22.4 points per outing. Known for his athleticism at 6-foot-5, 320 pounds, Brown's ability to shed blocks and disrupt plays at the line of scrimmage also helped improve the run defense. After giving up an average of 179.8 yards in '24, the Panthers yielded 123.3 last season.With the Panthers scheduled to open training camp July 22, Brown remains healthy and will be out to make a difference during the team's divisional title defense.A bigger difference.More NFL news:With Rico Dowdle gone, Panthers need production from backup RBsHow Panthers GM Dan Morgan improved team weaknessTwo returning Panthers facing tough NFL training camp challengesPanthers' Xavier Legette opens up about NFL struggles

title: Viktor Hovland Joins Wild Norway Fans for Viking Row After Winning Travelers Championship
description: The Norwegian golfer beat Scottie Scheffler on the first hole of a playoff that was pushed to Monday morning
content: Viktor Hovland and fansCredit: Ben Jared/PGA TOUR via GettyNEED TO KNOWViktor Hovland celebrated his Travelers Championship win his home country's now-famed Viking Row moveThe Norwegian golfer joined fans moments after winning the Travelers Championship on MondayHovland beat Scottie Scheffler in the sudden death playoffNorway’s soccer fans guided Viktor Hovland to victory!On Monday, June 29, the newly crowned winner of the Travelers Championship celebrated with his fellow countrymen — by doing the Viking Row.In a video taken moments after the 28-year-old former Oklahoma State golfer bested Scottie Scheffler in a sudden death playoff — pushed to Monday morning due to a Sunday rain delay — Hovland joyfully participated in the World Cup-rooted tradition.Moments after he drained a birdie and Scheffler couldn’t do the same, Hovland gave an interview, and then sat on a hill next to the 18th hole and rowed the imaginary Viking boat.Viktor HovlandCredit: Ben Jared/PGA TOUR via GettyHovland credited the Norwegian fans as one of the reasons why he was able to win his eighth tournament on tour."Obviously, it helps when you've got people like this cheering you on as well," Hovland said after the win. "So, yeah, it was a blast."Follow your favorite athletes on and off the field with PEOPLE's free sports newsletter — sign up now!So was the back-and-forth between the Norwegian golfer and Scheffler, who briefly flirted with a 59 on Friday.Entering the weekend, Hovland managed to catch up the 2024 winner of the Travelers, and he had a one-shot lead heading into Sunday.As the final pair traded birdies and bogeys — and waited out a rain delay — Scheffler gained momentum and then capitalized with an eight-and-a-half-foot putt to send the tournament to a playoff.With daylight fading, the playoff was scheduled for Monday morning. And Hovland quickly dispatched Scheffler in about 15 minutes of play just after 9 a.m. ET."Winning in the playoff against Scottie — best player in the world — that was pretty satisfying," Hovland said.Read the original article on People

title: Mookie Betts’ Surprisingly Strong All-Star Case
description: Think Mookie Betts is only an All-Star finalist on name recognition? Think again. His elite defense and recent hot streak make a strong case for the Midsummer Classic.
content: Los Angeles Dodgers shortstop Mookie Betts is on the cusp of his ninth All-Star selection, though this one could be his most controversial yet.Betts started slowly but has heated up at the plate in recent games, including homers in three of his last five.Before that, though, Betts spent much of the year with his batting average mired around the .200 mark.It didn’t help, of course, that he missed multiple weeks early in the season with a strained oblique.That left many around the baseball world wondering why Betts was a Phase 2 finalist for the Midsummer Classic this year, but as detailed by MLB.com’s Sonja Chen, those critics are missing a vital piece of the puzzle.Mookie Betts’ overlooked excellenceIn Phase 2, Betts is going head-to-head with CJ Abrams of the Washington Nationals for the starting shortstop spot.Abrams is having a much stronger offensive season. He has 17 home runs, 57 RBIs and is slashing .275/.358/.507/.865.Compare that to Betts, who has 11 homers and 27 RBIs, as well as a slash line of .236/.296/.441/.737.So on its face, Abrams would be the clear-cut favorite.But baseball isn’t just a hitting game, and on defense is where Betts shines.Jun 28, 2026; San Diego, California, USA; Los Angeles Dodgers shortstop Mookie Betts (50) turns a double play during the ninth inning against the San Diego Padres to end the game at Petco Park. Mandatory Credit: David Frerker-Imagn Images“Betts (+4 OAA) has also been the superior defender at shortstop over Abrams (-9 OAA), which could make this race closer than it would seem,” Chen wrote. What’s even more impressive is that this is only his second season at shortstop, and he’s been making game-changing plays like the World Series-winning double play last year and secured a win over the San Diego Padres with another double play on Sunday. With his recent hot streak, Betts’ offensive play is rising to meet his defense.What changed at the plate for Mookie Betts?Betts, who recently hit his 300th career home run, said his recent successes are building upon each other.“It’s like Steph (Curry),” Betts said, as reported by Fabian Ardaya of The Athletic. “You just need to see a ball go through the rim.”View this post on InstagramA post shared by Dodgers Nation (@dodgersnation)Over his last 14 games, Betts has five homers, 10 RBIs and a .368 average. He’s also slugging .684 and has an OPS of 1.103.With his defense remaining elite — he’s in the 90th percentile, per Baseball Savant — and his offense improving rapidly, Betts is no longer an All-Star candidate based on his career accomplishments.So don’t be surprised if Betts starts the Midsummer Classic. He’s earning it on the field.

title: Apple's iPhone 18 Pro, iPhone ultra launch expected in early September
description: iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone Ultra: Apple is expected to unveil its next-gen flagship smartphones at its annual September event, with the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max, and the company's first-ever foldable iPhone, which is likely to be called the iPhone Ultra or iPhone Fold, expected to be launched.
content: Apple is expected to unveil its next-gen flagship smartphones at its annual September event, with the iPhone 18 Pro and iPhone 18 Pro Max, and the company's first-ever foldable iPhone, which is likely to be called the iPhone Ultra or iPhone Fold, expected to be launched. According to analysts and supply chain reports, Apple could hold its launch event on September 8, 2026, with pre-orders opening soon after the devices likely going on sale about a week later, following the company's usual launch pattern.HDFC Bank appoints former Finance Secretary Rajiv Kumar as part-time Chairman iPhone 18 Pro series: Familiar design, better performanceThe iPhone 18 Pro lineup is expected to have the same design as iPhone 17 Pro. Nonetheless, some hardware upgrades will be introduced. Reports state that Apple will continue with its aluminium design and the raised camera module, while adding new colour options such as Dark, Cherry Red, Light Blue, Dark Grey, and Silver.The biggest upgrade expected in the 18th generation is the A20 Pro Chip, which is likely to be built using a 2nm manufacturing process, promising a faster overall experience and improved battery duration.Apple is also expected to introduce an upgraded LTPO+ display and reduce the size of the Dynamic Island by moving Face ID components below the screen. Also, some camera improvements are expected, with the 48MP main camera likely to feature a variable aperture, which would allow users better low-light photography and control over depth of field.Besides the aforementioned, the Pro models could offer longer battery life, more RAM across the lineup and improved connectivity through Apple's next-generation C2 modem.8th Pay Commission Salary Calculator: Rs 21 lakh arrears for level 10 central govt employees? Check full salary calculation Foldable iPhone could steal the spotlightThis year's September event will likely witness the unveiling of Apple's first foldable iPhone. It is rumoured to be called the iPhone Ultra. As per the renders, the device will feature a book-style folding design with an inner display measuring around 7.8 inches.Assertions are rife that Apple has developed an advanced mechanism that could also help with heat management. The foldable device is expected to be priced above $2,000 (INR 1,89,120), with some reports suggesting it could cost as much as $2,500(INR 2,35,900).

title: Skipper Conneely signs new deal with Accrington
description: Accrington Stanley captain Seamus Conneely agrees a one-year contract extension to take the midfielder into his 13th season with the League Two club.
content: Accrington Stanley captain Seamus Conneely has agreed a new contract. [Shutterstock]Accrington Stanley captain Seamus Conneely has agreed a one-year contract extension to take the midfielder into his 13th season with the League Two club.Conneely, 37, joined Accrington in 2015 after a spell in Ireland with Sligo Rovers and has made 419 appearances for Stanley."We are very happy for Seamus to commit himself again to the club," Accrington  boss John Doolan said."We all know what the club means to him, so it's great he has extended his stay with us and, as always, I look forward to working with him."

title: Borussia Dortmund eyeing up Brøndby IF's Benjamin Tahirovic
description: Last season's Bundesliga runners-up Borussia Dortmund are reportedly considering a summer move for Benjamin Tahirovic.According to Sky Germany, the Bosnian player has been a candidate for the Westphal...
content: Borussia Dortmund eyeing up Brøndby IF's Benjamin TahirovicLast season's Bundesliga runners-up Borussia Dortmund are reportedly considering a summer move for Benjamin Tahirovic.According to Sky Germany, the Bosnian player has been a candidate for the Westphalian giants for several months.It's suggested that Dortmund even expressed their interest in the Brøndby IF star even before the 2026 World Cup.At that time, Sebastian Kehl was still responsible for transfers at BVB, and interest in Tahirovic naturally cooled.Since then, Ole Book has taken over from Kehl, but the 23-year-old is still on Borussia Dortmund's transfer shortlist.BVB finds the potential transfer fee for the Bosnian attractive considering the midfielder is likely available for under €10million.The 31-time international's contract at Brøndby runs until 2028 – He also started in two of Bosnia's three World Cup matches thus far.

title: തിരുവനന്തപുരം കോർപറേഷനിലെ കയ്യാങ്കളി, ബിജെപി കൗൺസിലർമാർക്കെതിരെ കേസ്, ചെമ്പഴന്തി ഉദയൻ ഒന്നാം പ്രതി
description: യുഡിഎഫ് വനിതാ കൗൺസിലർമാരെ തടഞ്ഞുവെച്ച് ദേഹോപദ്രവം ഏൽപ്പിച്ചു എന്നാണ് പരാതി. അതേസമയം ഇന്നുണ്ടായ കയ്യാങ്കളിയിൽ ബിജെപിയെ കൗൺസിലർമാർ ഇതുവരെ പൊലീസിൽ പരാതി നൽകിയിട്ടില്ല.
content: <p>തിരുവനന്തപുരം: തിരുവനന്തപുരം നഗരസഭയിലെ കൗൺസിൽ യോഗത്തിനിടയിലെ കയ്യാങ്കളിയിൽ ബിജെപി കൗൺസിലർമാർക്കെതിരെ കേസ്. യുഡിഎഫിലെ വനിതാ കൗൺസിലർമാരായ ഷെർലി, അനിത അലക്സ് എന്നിവർ നൽകിയ പരാതിയിലാണ് മ്യൂസിയം പോലീസ് കേസെടുത്തത്. ബിജെപി കൗൺസിലർ ചെമ്പഴന്തി ഉദയനാണ് കേസിൽ ഒന്നാംപ്രതി. ഗിരി, പാപ്പനംകോട് സജി, വയൽക്കര രതീഷ് എന്നിവരും കേസിൽ പ്രതികളാണ്. യുഡിഎഫ് വനിതാ കൗൺസിലർമാരെ തടഞ്ഞുവെച്ച് ദേഹോപദ്രവം ഏൽപ്പിച്ചു എന്നാണ് പരാതി. അതേസമയം ഇന്നുണ്ടായ കയ്യാങ്കളിയിൽ ബിജെപിയെ കൗൺസിലർമാർ ഇതുവരെ പൊലീസിൽ പരാതി നൽകിയിട്ടില്ല.</p><p>ഇന്ന് വൈകിട്ട് തിരുവനന്തപുരം നഗരസഭ കൗണ്‍സിലിൽ യോഗത്തിന് ശേഷമാണ് യുഡിഎഫ്-ബിജെപി കൗൺസിലർമാർ തമ്മിൽ കയ്യാങ്കളിയും സംഘർഷവും ഉണ്ടായത്. സുഗതന്‍റെ രാജിക്കായുള്ള യുഡിഎഫ്-എൽഡിഎഫ് പ്രതിഷേധത്തിനിടെ അതിവേഗം അജണ്ടകൾ പാസായെന്ന് മേയർ പ്രഖ്യാപിച്ച് കസേര വിട്ടതിന് പിന്നാലെയാണ് സംഘർഷം ഉണ്ടായത്. ഹാജർ രജിസ്റ്ററിനെ ചൊല്ലിയുള്ള പിടിവലിക്കിടെ കെ എസ് ശബരിനാഥാനും ചെമ്പഴന്തി ഉദയനും തമ്മിൽ ഏറ്റുമുട്ടി. കാപ്പാ കേസിൽ ജയിലിലുള്ള ആർ സുഗതനെ രക്ഷിക്കാൻ ഉദയൻ രജിസ്റ്റർ പിടിച്ചുവാങ്ങിയെന്നും വനിതാ കൗൺസിലർമാരെ കയ്യേറ്റം ചെയ്തെന്നുമാണ് യുഡിഎഫ് പരാതി. എന്നാൽ രജിസ്റ്ററിൽ വെള്ളമൊഴിക്കാനായിരുന്നു യുഡിഎഫ് ശ്രമമെന്ന് മേയർ ആരോപിച്ചു.</p><p></p><p>&nbsp;</p>

title: Have your say in Palm Beach County's top offensive lineman for 2026
description: Have your say by voting for the top high school offensive lineman for the 2026 season.
content: With the football season less than three months away, high school programs are powering though summer workouts.As part of our preseason summer coverage, The Post put together a comprehensive list of Palm Beach County's top 10 running backs to watch for the 2026 season.Now, we're turning things over to our audience, where you have your chance to vote for the best offensive lineman of the coming season.Voting will be open until Monday, July 6 at noon.Vote for The Post's top high school offensive lineman of 2026Alex Peterman is a high school sports reporter for The Palm Beach Post. He can be reached at apeterman@usatodayco.com. This article originally appeared on Palm Beach Post: Have your say in Palm Beach County's top offensive lineman for 2026

title: PGRSలో 69 ఫిర్యాదులు స్వీకరణ
description: Nellore PGRS Grievance: జిల్లా వ్యాప్తంగా వివిధ సమస్యలతో వచ్చే బాధితుల అర్జీలను సత్వరమే పరిష్కరించడంతో పాటు ప్రతి ఫిర్యాదును క్షుణ్ణంగా విచారించి బాధితులకు చట్టపరమైన న్యాయం...
content:
Nellore PGRS Grievance: జిల్లా వ్యాప్తంగా వివిధ సమస్యలతో వచ్చే బాధితుల అర్జీలను సత్వరమే పరిష్కరించడంతో పాటు ప్రతి ఫిర్యాదును క్షుణ్ణంగా విచారించి బాధితులకు చట్టపరమైన న్యాయం చేయాలని నెల్లూరు జిల్లా ఎస్పీ డాక్టర్ అజిత వేజెండ్ల సంబంధిత పోలీస్ అధికారులను ఆదేశించారు. ఒకసారి స్వీకరించిన ప్రజా వినతులు పరిష్కారం కాక మళ్లీ మళ్లీ పునరావృతం కాకుండా క్షేత్రస్థాయి అధికారులు అత్యంత బాధ్యతాయుతంగా వ్యవహరించాలని స్పష్టం చేశారు. సోమవారం నాడు జిల్లా పోలీసు ప్రధాన కార్యాలయంలో జిల్లా అడిషనల్ ఎస్పీ (అడ్మిన్) సిహెచ్. సౌజన్య తదితర పోలీస్ ఉన్నతాధికారుల సమక్షంలో నిర్వహించిన “ప్రజా ఫిర్యాదుల పరిష్కార వేదిక (PGRS – Public Grievance Redressal System)” కార్యక్రమంలో జిల్లాలోని వివిధ ప్రాంతాల నుండి వచ్చిన ప్రజల నుండి మొత్తం 69 ఫిర్యాదులను స్వీకరించారు.



ఈ సందర్భంగా ఎస్పీ గారి ఆదేశాల మేరకు అడిషనల్ ఎస్పీ సౌజన్య మాట్లాడుతూ.. పోలీస్ స్టేషన్లకు వచ్చే ప్రజా ఫిర్యాదుల పట్ల ఎలాంటి అలసత్వం ప్రదర్శించరాదన్నారు. బాధితులతో మర్యాదపూర్వకంగా, జవాబుదారీతనంతో వ్యవహరించాలని, ప్రతి పిటిషన్‌ను సమగ్రంగా విచారించి త్వరితగతిన పరిష్కరించాలన్నారు.



Read Also: గిరిజన హక్కుల కోసమే పవన్ ఆ శాఖ తీసుకున్నారు.. నాగబాబు



అనుమానాస్పద మృతి, బాలిక అదృశ్యంపై ప్రత్యేక ఫోకస్



ఈరోజు జరిగిన ఈ గ్రీవెన్స్ సెల్ కార్యక్రమంలో పలు సంచలన ఫిర్యాదులు వచ్చాయి. విడవలూరు పోలీస్ స్టేషన్ పరిధికి చెందిన ఒక బాధితుడు ఫిర్యాదు చేస్తూ.. ఇటీవల తన తల్లి అనుమానాస్పద స్థితిలో మరణించిందని, ఈ విషయమై ఇప్పటికే విడవలూరు పోలీస్ స్టేషన్‌లో అనుమానాస్పద మృతిగా కేసు నమోదైనట్లు తెలిపారు. ఈ కేసును లోతుగా విచారించి తన తల్లి మరణానికి కారణమైన నిందితులపై కఠిన చర్యలు తీసుకోవాలని కోరారు. అలాగే బుచ్చిరెడ్డిపాలెం పోలీస్ స్టేషన్ పరిధికి చెందిన మరో ఫిర్యాదుదారుడు స్పందిస్తూ.. తన మైనర్ కుమార్తె ఈనెల 14వ తేదీ నుండి కనిపించడం లేదని, బుచ్చి స్టేషన్‌లో కేసు నమోదైనప్పటికీ ఇప్పటివరకు ఆచూకీ లభించలేదని, త్వరితగతిన విచారించి తన కుమార్తెను అప్పగించి న్యాయం చేయాలని కన్నీరు మున్నీరయ్యారు.







కోవూరు పోలీస్ స్టేషన్ పరిధికి చెందిన ఒక వివాహిత ఫిర్యాదు చేస్తూ.. అదనపు కట్నం కోసం తన భర్త, అత్తమామలు శారీరకంగా, మానసికంగా వేధిస్తున్నారని ఆవేదన వ్యక్తం చేశారు. తన భర్త ఇతర మహిళలతో వివాహేతర సంబంధాలు పెట్టుకుని తనను తీవ్ర ఇబ్బందులకు గురిచేస్తున్నాడని, ఈ గృహ హింసపై విచారణ జరిపి తనకు రక్షణ కల్పించి న్యాయం చేయాలని అర్జీ సమర్పించారు.



Nellore PGRS Grievance: బాధితులకు భరోసా – నిర్లక్ష్యం వహిస్తే చర్యలు



ఈ మూడు కీలక ఫిర్యాదులతో పాటు వచ్చిన అన్ని అర్జీలను పరిశీలించిన అడిషనల్ ఎస్పీ Ch. సౌజన్య.. సంబంధిత విడవలూరు, బుచ్చిరెడ్డిపాలెం, కోవూరు సర్కిల్ ఇన్‌స్పెక్టర్లతో ఫోన్లలో మాట్లాడి తక్షణమే దర్యాప్తు వేగవంతం చేయాలని ఆదేశించారు. ప్రజా ఫిర్యాదుల పరిష్కార వేదిక (PGRS) నందు వచ్చిన ప్రతి ఫిర్యాదుపై చట్టపరంగా నిష్పక్షపాత విచారణ జరిపి బాధితులకు పూర్తి స్థాయిలో న్యాయం చేస్తామని, మహిళలు, మైనర్ల రక్షణకు అత్యంత ప్రాధాన్యత ఇస్తామని హామీ ఇచ్చారు. సమస్యలను త్వరితగతిన పరిష్కరించేందుకు అవసరమైతే స్పెషల్ టీమ్స్ రంగంలోకి దించుతామన్నారు.



జిల్లా పోలీసు కార్యాలయంలో జరిగిన ఈ సమగ్ర వినతుల స్వీకరణ కార్యక్రమంలో డీసీఆర్‌బీ (DCRB) సీఐ రామారావు, ఉమెన్ పోలీస్ స్టేషన్ (WPS) సీఐ సుబ్బారావు, స్పెషల్ బ్రాంచ్ (SB-2) సీఐ శ్రీనివాసులు రెడ్డి, గ్రీవెన్స్ సెల్ పోలీస్ సిబ్బంది మరియు జిల్లా నలుమూలల నుండి వచ్చిన బాధితులు పాల్గొన్నారు.

title: Sachin Tendulkar Pens Emotional Farewell For Ben Stokes, Says 'Staying Away From Cricket Will Be Hard'
description: Ben Stokes' retirement from international cricket prompted an outpouring of tributes, notably from cricket legend Sachin Tendulkar.  Tendulkar highlighted Stokes' energetic approach and fearless mindset.
content: Tributes from all around the cricket world followed Ben Stokes' retirement from international cricket, which marked the end of one of England's greatest modern careers. Batting legend Sachin Tendulkar was among the first to pay tribute to the all-rounder, reflecting on Stokes' extraordinary influence on the game. Tendulkar lauded the England star's bold attitude, contagious optimism, and capacity to perform well under duress in a heartfelt social media post. Sachin Tendulkar's Heartfelt Message For Ben StokesIn an emotional farewell message, he praised Stokes' leadership abilities, referred to him as one of England's best all-rounders, and wished him success in the next phase of his life."I’ve always admired the way you brought energy into the game. Your positivity, your fearless intent, and the way you shaped moments under pressure stood out every time you walked in. As an all-rounder, you’ve been one of England’s finest, and as a captain, your bold tactics and instinctive reading of the game added a new edge to your side. Wishing you the very best for what comes next. Though knowing you, staying away from the middle might be the hardest part. Good luck for your next innings," Sachin Tendulkar wrote from his official X account.New Zealand Spoil Ben Stokes' FarewellBen Stokes's final international cricket match ended with a crushing defeat as an injury-hit New Zealand defeated England by 160 runs in the third Test at Trent Bridge on Monday. With the victory, New Zealand won the three-match series 2-1. This was only their fourth series victory in England in 20 attempts, and it was only the second time since their 1999 victory in England that they had won after falling down 1-0. Additionally, it was England's first series loss at home in three or more Test matches since 2012 and their seventh loss in nine Test matches. England captain Stokes suddenly announced his retirement from international cricket on Sunday, which became the biggest talking point from this Test. After serving as England's captain for four years, the 35-year-old all-rounder claimed to be 'burnt out', although Stokes stressed he will still play for county team Durham.

title: Tottenham Hotspur Are Keeping A Keen Eye On This Ligue 1 Keeper: Should De Zerbi Snap Him Up?
description: In a recent report, TyC Sports claimed that Tottenham Hotspur are keeping a keen eye on Olympique Marseille keeper Geronimo Rulli ahead of a potential move for him this summer. It has been mentioned t...
content: Tottenham Hotspur Are Keeping A Keen Eye On This Ligue 1 Keeper: Should De Zerbi Snap Him Up?In a recent report, TyC Sports claimed that Tottenham Hotspur are keeping a keen eye on Olympique Marseille keeper Geronimo Rulli ahead of a potential move for him this summer. It has been mentioned that Spurs are eyeing a move to secure the services of the Argentine goalie in this summer transfer window.Rulli’s Decent Campaign In Ligue 1Rulli enjoyed a good run of form at the French club last season as he produced a series of impressive displays for them in Ligue 1. The 34-year-old conceded 52 goals and secured nine clean sheets in 39 appearances for Marseille in the previous campaign across all fronts.The Argentine talent is currently among the most experienced keepers in Ligue 1. Hence, Spurs would do well to lure him to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium this off-season.His current contract at the French club will run out at the end of next season, which could open the door for Tottenham to sign him on the cheap later this year.MADRID, SPAIN – SEPTEMBER 16: Geronimo Rulli of Olympique de Marseille adjusts his gloves prior to the UEFA Champions League 2025/26 League Phase MD1 match between Real Madrid C.F. and Olympique de Marseille at Estadio Santiago Bernabeu on September 16, 2025 in Madrid, Spain. (Photo by Angel Martinez/Getty Images)Should Tottenham Hotspur Boss Roberto De Zerbi Snap Rulli Up This Summer?Rulli is a good handler of the ball and can use his quick reflexes to make some decent saves at the back for his team. He doesn’t mind clearing his lines when being chased down the opposition attackers and is a good passer as well from the back.Standing at 1.89m, the Argentine talent can use his strong frame to dominate his penalty area. However, only time will tell whether he can make a smooth transition to life in the Premier League if Spurs manage to bring him on board in this transfer window.Rulli will bring more quality and depth to Tottenham boss Roberto De Zerbi’s defence. He has what it takes to fight for a regular first-team spot at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium next season.At 34, Rulli is past his prime but could still serve as a useful player in the North London club’s squad. Therefore, De Zerbi would be wise to go all out to snap him up later this year. However, De Zerbi has to be patient with his progress before he can get the best out of the experienced keeper at Tottenham.

title: Indian Army Denies Reports Of Chinese Encroachment In Arunachal, Calls Them 'Incorrect, Without Any Basis'
description: The Indian Army has refuted media claims regarding new encroachments by the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) and the establishment of camps in Arunachal Pradesh, labeling the reports as "incorrect" and "without any basis."
content: The Indian Army on Monday dismissed media reports alleging fresh encroachment by the Chinese People's Liberation Army (PLA) and the establishment of new camps in Arunachal Pradesh, calling the claims "incorrect" and "without any basis."In an official statement, the army said it had taken note of reports suggesting recent Chinese incursions along the India-China border in Arunachal Pradesh and asserted that the information being circulated was factually inaccurate."We have seen some media reports alleging recent encroachment by Chinese PLA and setting up of camps in Arunachal Pradesh. These reports are incorrect and without any basis," Indian Army said in a statement.The Indian Army's response was issued after a tribal organisation in Arunachal Pradesh's Upper Subansiri district alleged that the Chinese PLA has gradually occupied parts of its ancestral land along the India-China border.The clarification comes amid heightened public attention on developments along the Line of Actual Control (LAC), where India and China have remained engaged in military and diplomatic efforts to maintain peace and stability following the 2020 eastern Ladakh standoff.India has consistently maintained that it closely monitors all developments along the border and remains committed to safeguarding the country's territorial integrity while addressing border-related issues through established diplomatic and military mechanisms.Situation Along China Border Stable: General Upendra DwivediOutgoing Army chief General Upendra Dwivedi on Monday said the situation along the China border is stable even though it continues to be sensitive, requiring constant vigilance, and added that the two militaries hold over 1100 ground-level interactions annually to prevent misunderstandings and address routine border issues.In an interaction with news agency ANI, General Dwivedi said the disengagement agreements have contributed significantly to improving stability on the ground and both sides are displaying greater responsiveness towards each other's concerns.He informed that the "overall situation is being managed through well-established mechanisms". "Whenever local issues arise due to differing perceptions of the LAC, they are addressed through military-to-military interactions, hotlines, flag meetings and commander-level engagements. These mechanisms have helped ensure stability and facilitate routine activities, including patrolling and other local interactions in border areas," General Dwivedi said. Clarifying Indian Army's priorities, "First, we must preserve peace and tranquillity along the LAC. Second, we seek to resolve local issues through dialogue and established mechanisms. Third, we remain committed to maintaining a robust and credible deployment posture to deter any potential threat. Simultaneously, we continue to strengthen infrastructure, logistics, surveillance capabilities and overall operational preparedness along the Northern Borders."

Worthing sign winger Nathaniel-George from York
description: Worthing boss Adam Hinshelwood returns to former club York City to sign winger Ashley Nathaniel-George.
content: Nathaniel-George played under Worthing manager Adam Hinshelwood at York City [Getty Images]Worthing boss Adam Hinshelwood has returned to former club York City to sign winger Ashley Nathaniel-George.The 31-year-old Antigua & Barbuda international joined the Minstermen when Hinshelwood was in charge two years ago and has now followed him south after his contract expired.Nathaniel-George previously featured for Crawley Town and Southend United in League Two and has also had spells with Torquay United, Maidenhead United, Hartlepool United and Wealdstone."On his day he can be a real game changer with the way he can just glide past players," Hinshelwood  told the club's website. "I'm really excited to be working with him again."

title: NBA free agency: Ranking 8 teams poised to make biggest moves
description: The Golden State Warriors, Boston Celtics and Los Angeles Lakers are the most fascinating teams to watch when NBA free agency begins. Here's why:
content: The NBA rumors are flying and speculation is swirling with the start to the league's free agency period. There's just one catch.At the moment, only a few teams actually have an abundance of salary cap space to spend on free agents this year. Instead, blockbuster trade discussions and contract extension negotiations (and the subsequent fallout from them) are dominating the lead up to NBA free agency in 2026.Giannis Antetokounmpo was already traded from the Milwaukee Bucks to the Miami Heat and LaMelo Ball went to the Minnesota Timberwolves thanks to the first of two major trades by the Charlotte Hornets. The ripple effects from those moves have started.Draymond Green could be positioning the Golden State Warriors to get LeBron James and moves involving stars like Jaylen Brown, Kawhi Leonard and Ja Morant are among those anticipated in the coming days. The NBA's negotiating window for free agents officially opens on Tuesday, June 30 at 6 p.m. ET and a wave of transactions are expected to follow.Here's a ranking of the eight NBA teams most likely to shape free agency this year:NBA GAMBLING SCANDAL: Malik Beasley indicted as part of alleged sports betting schemeRanking NBA teams to watch during free agency1. Golden State WarriorsThe Warriors' interest in LeBron James, and a report that they could also be eyeing reuniting James with former Lakers' teammate Anthony Davis, have quickly turned Golden State into the team that can make the biggest splash this offseason. The potential of teaming Steph Curry and Draymond Green with James is there if James is willing to accept less money than he's used to making. 2. Boston CelticsThe future of Jaylen Brown now hovers over the Celtics offseason after he was so publicly dangled in Giannis Antetokounmpo trade talks. The team is still reportedly exploring moving him. Can he and the franchise reconcile at this point? Many front offices around the league are watching closely to see if they can pounce on a potential ending. GM Brad Stevens previously said Boston is also in the market for reinforcements inside this offseason. 3. Los Angeles LakersThe Lakers will either convince LeBron James to stay or be one of the few teams in the league with a significant amount of cap space to build around Luka Doncic and Austin Reaves. Either way, their next move will be fascinating. Los Angeles is likely in the market for a center, despite DeAndre Ayton's decision to opt in to his contract for the 2026-27 season.4. Los Angeles ClippersThe Clippers are reportedly interested in trading Kawhi Leonard as part of a pivot to get younger, though his desire for a new contract could limit potential suitors. They also could have cap space to operate with this offseason. The franchise is still awaiting the results of an NBA investigation into its agreement with Leonard and possible collective bargaining agreement violations related to Leonard's endorsement deal with Aspiration.  5. Detroit PistonsThe Pistons followed a tremendous regular season with a playoff run that highlighted how limited they are offensively outside of star Cade Cunningham. Surrounding him with a better supporting cast appears to be a priority after Detroit offloaded Isaiah Stewart's contract and traded for Isaiah Joe. The Pistons reportedly covet Tyler Herro, who was traded to the Milwaukee Bucks in exchange for Giannis Antetokounmpo. 6. Toronto RaptorsThe Raptors are one of the teams in the running for Leonard after winning a title with him in 2019 and they've been mentioned in speculation related to several possible trades this offseason. Toronto has a collection of players, draft picks and contracts, most notably, RJ Barrett, to put together a package for any stars that come available. The Raptors' motivation to compete with the Knicks and Cavaliers in the East could prompt a major move.  7. Portland Trail BlazersThe Trail Blazers have a new owner who is used to winning with his NHL team and has money available to spend under the NBA salary cap. They've been mentioned as a team interested in making a major deal after the franchise's first playoff appearance in five years. Portland can use the contracts of Jerami Grant, draft picks and several players from their young nucleus, and it seems to be in the mix for Brown.8. Brooklyn NetsThe Nets could be one of the few teams with actual cap space to spend after already acquiring Julius Randle from the Minnesota Timberwolves via trade. Michael Porter Jr. is on an expiring contract worth $40.8 million this season and could be an attractive trade option in exchange for Jaylen Brown, or up until the trade deadline. The Nets could also sign him to a contract extension after he had a career year in Brooklyn last season. This article originally appeared on USA TODAY: NBA free agency: Ranking 8 teams poised to make biggest moves

title: Dodgers 14 Games From Matching Overlooked MLB Record
description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have finished all 84 of their games this season in nine innings, which is just 14 games short of the MLB record.
content: The Los Angeles Dodgers have finished all 84 of their games this season in nine innings, which is just 14 games short of the MLB record.View this post on InstagramA post shared by Dodgers Nation (@dodgersnation)The Boston Red Sox are the current holders of the record, as they played 98 consecutive games without reaching extra innings during the 2005 season. Other notable streaks since 1901 include the 2002 Chicago White Sox at 69 games and the 2023 Colorado Rockies at 67 games.The Dodgers have not played an extra inning game yet this year.   84 games played.  The Dodgers hold the National League record with their current streak.   MLB record is 98 games. pic.twitter.com/kbFkaK4V7b— Mooney Owns You (@MooneyOwnsYou) June 29, 2026The Dodgers are currently the only team in the league who are yet to play an extra-innings game so far this season. LA’s previous record in this category came in 1899, when they played 76 games without reaching extras. Their current streak of 84 games is also the longest in National League history.Last season, the Dodgers wasted no time in playing their first extra-innings game, as the Detroit Tigers took them beyond the ninth inning in the fourth game of the season. Over the course of the regular season, they played a total of 15 extra-inning games.The longest streak the Dodgers put together last season lasted 27 games, which happened on two separate occasions.Oct 27, 2025; Los Angeles, California, USA; Los Angeles Dodgers first baseman Freddie Freeman (5) is mobbed as he crosses the plate after hitting a walk-off solo home run in the 18th inning during game three of the 2025 MLB World Series against the Toronto Blue Jays at Dodger Stadium. Mandatory Credit: Jayne Kamin-Oncea-Imagn ImagesWhen Did the Dodgers Last Play an Extra-Innings Game?The Dodgers played three extra-innings games last postseason, with the most recent one obviously being a dramatic Game 7 win against the Toronto Blue Jays in the World Series. During that game the Dodgers saw plenty of heroics, from dramatic home runs to slick defensive plays. Their longest game of the postseason also came against the Blues Jays less than a week prior, as they played 18 innings at Dodger Stadium before a Freddie Freeman walk-off home run sent everyone home.The first extra-innings game of their postseason came against the Philadelphia Phillies, when a throwing error from Phillies reliever Orion Kettering put an end to the game. While this streak won’t be something the Dodgers are actively looking to extend, they still have a shot at making history and are sure to keep putting away games in a healthy manner rather than dragging things into a coin toss in extra innings. Their next shot to extend their streak comes against the Athletics on the road beginning Monday at 6:40 p.m. PT.What is your favorite Dodgers extra-inning moment?

জেপি নড্ডাই মুকলি কৰিলে ঔষধ সম্পৰ্কীয় তথ্যৰ ডিজিটেল প্লেটফৰ্ম ‘ড্ৰাগ ৰেজিষ্ট্ৰী’
description:
ডিজিটেল ডেস্কঃ সোমবাৰে কেন্দ্ৰীয় স্বাস্থ্য আৰু পৰিয়াল কল্যাণ মন্ত্ৰী জেপি নড্ডাই আনুষ্ঠানিকভাৱে মুকলি কৰে দেশত ঔষধ সম্পৰ্কীয় তথ্যৰ ডিজিটেল প্লেটফৰ্ম ‘ড্ৰাগ ৰেজিষ্ট্ৰী’। স্বাস্থ্য খণ্ডত ঔষধৰ তথ্যৰ সঠিক চিনাক্তকৰণ, সংৰক্ষণ, আদান-প্ৰদান আৰু ব্যৱহাৰ নিশ্চিত কৰাৰ উদ্দেশ্যে এই ব্যৱস্থা আৰম্ভ কৰা হৈছে।
কেন্দ্ৰীয় স্বাস্থ্য আৰু পৰিয়াল কল্যাণ মন্ত্ৰালয়ে প্ৰকাশ কৰা অনুসৰি, ড্ৰাগ ৰেজিষ্ট্ৰীক Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM)-ৰ অধীনত নিৰ্মাণ কৰা হৈছে। এই প্লেটফৰ্মে দেশৰ সকলো স্বাস্থ্য ব্যৱস্থাৰ বাবে ঔষধ সম্পৰ্কীয় তথ্যৰ একক আৰু নিৰ্ভৰযোগ্য উৎস হিচাপে কাম কৰিব। বৰ্তমান একে ঔষধ বিভিন্ন স্বাস্থ্য প্ৰতিষ্ঠান, চিকিৎসালয় বা ডিজিটেল স্বাস্থ্য ব্যৱস্থাত ভিন্ন নাম বা ভিন্ন ফৰ্মেটত লিপিবদ্ধ হোৱাৰ ফলত তথ্যৰ বিসংগতি বা পুনৰাবৃত্তি হয়। নতুন প্লেটফৰ্মটোৱে এই সমস্যাসমূহ দূৰ কৰাত সহায়ক হ’ব বুলি আশা কৰা হৈছে।
ইফালে, স্বাস্থ্য মন্ত্ৰালয়ে উল্লেখ কৰে যে, এই পদক্ষেপে স্বাস্থ্যখণ্ডত দেশৰ ডিজিটেল ব্যৱস্থাক অধিক শক্তিশালী কৰাৰ লগতে চিকিৎসক, ফাৰ্মাচিষ্ট, চিকিৎসালয় আৰু অন্যান্য স্বাস্থ্যসেৱা প্ৰদানকাৰী সংস্থাৰ মাজত তথ্যৰ সঠিক আদান-প্ৰদানত সহায় কৰিব। ইয়াৰ জৰিয়তে স্বাস্থ্যসেৱাৰ মান উন্নত হোৱাৰ লগতে ৰোগীৰ চিকিৎসা ব্যৱস্থাপনাও অধিক সহজ হব বুলি অনুমান কৰা হৈছে।

title: Basketball stars Malik Beasley and Ed Davis among suspects charged in plot to bet on NBA games
description: Prosecutors accused Malik Beasley, Ed Davis and four others of running an ‘illegal betting ring’ to earn hundreds of thousands of dollars
content: Former NBA stars Malik Beasley and Ed Davis have been indicted in connection with an alleged illegal sports betting and bribery scheme. Beasley and Davis are facing charges alongside four alleged co-conspirators, identified as William Brown, Robert Gorodetsky, Ernesto Plascencia and current NBA player agent Paolo Zamorano, the U.S. Attorney’s Office for the Eastern District of New York announced Monday. Prosecutors claimed Beasley agreed to alter his performance during multiple games while playing for the Milwaukee Bucks from 2023 to 2024 and accepted bribes from his co-defendants, who used that “non-public information” to place bets based on his performance “with the intention of profiting off the scheme.”“As alleged, the defendants turned professional basketball into a criminal betting operation, bribing then-NBA player Malik Beasley to fix his performance in multiple games in order to place fraudulent wagers, enrich themselves and cheat legitimate sportsbooks,” U.S. Attorney Joseph Nocella Jr. said in a statement.Malik Beasley, 29, is accused of accepting bribes and agreeing to alter his performance during games while playing for the Milwaukee Bucks, prosecutors said (Getty)The group is accused of attempting to “unlawfully earn hundreds of thousands of dollars” through this “illegal betting ring,” according to James Barnacle Jr., the assistant director in charge of the FBI’s New York field office.“As alleged, Malik Beasley allowed himself to be bought and altered his gametime performance to line pockets of Ed Davis and his other co-conspirators,” he said.Prosecutors said “several” defendants were arrested Monday and will be arraigned at an unspecified later date.“Bribery and insider betting schemes like this one involving former NBA players and a current NBA player agent who exploited inside NBA information for profit erode the integrity of American sports and victimize the sports-watching public,” Nocella added.The indictment listed multiple examples of Milwaukee Bucks games that were influenced by this alleged scheme, including a match against the Cleveland Cavaliers on January 26, 2024. Ed Davis, 37, was charged alongside Beasley and four other co-conspirators, according to prosecutors (Getty)Prosecutors alleged Beasley told Davis he planned to underperform during that game in exchange for a bribe payment, and that this information was passed along to the other co-defendants, allowing them to place “fraudulent wagers,” many of which were “successful.”Other impacted Bucks games included a match against the Charlotte Hornets on February 27, 2024, and another against the Los Angeles Clippers on March 10, 2024, according to the indictment. NBA spokesperson Mike Bass said the organization is “in the process of reviewing the federal indictment unsealed today involving Malik Beasley and Ed Davis.”“Beasley last played in the NBA during the 2024-25 season and Davis last played in the league during the 2021-22 season. We will continue to investigate this matter and cooperate with the relevant authorities. We take these allegations with the utmost seriousness, and the integrity of our game remains our top priority,” Bass told The Independent. The Independent has contacted Beasley’s attorney for comment. The Independent was unable to immediately identify attorneys for Davis, Brown, Gorodetsky, Plascencia and Zamorano. “We’ll review the indictment and vigorously the charges and maintain Malik’s innocence,” Beasley’s attorney Steve Haney told The Athletic.Beasley joined the Milwaukee Bucks in 2023 following stints with the Los Angeles Lakers, Utah Jazz, Minnesota Timberwolves and Denver Nuggets. The 29-year-old moved to the Detroit Pistons for the 2024-2025 season, and earlier this year, he signed with the Santurce Crabbers, a Puerto Rican team co-owned by music star Bad Bunny.Davis, 37, most recently played for the Cleveland Cavaliers during the 2021-2022 season. He and Bealsey were teammates on the Minnesota Timberwolves in 2020 and 2021.

title: Chris Johnson's rise from high school track star to NFL great
description: Johnson was a track star in high school but underrecruited football running back who went on to star in the NFL for several seasons.
content: On Monday morning, June 29, former Tennessee Titans running back Chris Johnson announced on ABC's "Good Morning America" that he had been diagnosed with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, or ALS. During the interview, Johnson, 40, said that he began to notice weakness in his right hand and it just progressed from there over the last year. Johnson has been retired from the NFL since 2017 following a memorable 10-season career in the NFL, playing with the Titans, New York Jets and Arizona Cardinals.Long before Johnson was setting the NFL landscape ablaze as one of the league's fastest players, however, he was an underrecruited high school back who made a name for himself at East Carolina University and was eventually taken as a first round draft pick.Here's a look back at Johnson's road from preps standout to one of the few men to rush for over 2,000 yards in the NFL. A football and track star in OrlandoComing out of high school, Johnson was not the big name that he would ultimately become in the NFL. He played at Olympia High School in Orlando where he was a running back and also a star on the track team. As a junior, he took over as the team's lead ball carrier, rushing for more than 1,000 yards.Johnson returned as a senior in 2003 but saw his final season cut short due to a leg injury that limited him to just four games. However, in those four games, he ran for nearly 800 yards and eight touchdowns. That leg injury did not hinder Johnson during the track season. He finished second in the 100-meter dash during the 2004 Florida Class 4A state championship meet with a time of 10.38. That year he set a personal best of 21.28 in the 200-meter dash, which ranked him inside the top 25 nationally that year. Johnson was also the anchor on Olympia's national title-winning 4x100m relay team.Even with that success in track, Johnson decided to go to college to play football. He was unranked out of high school and ultimately committed to ECU. Rise from return specialist to CJ2kJohnson went to ECU and instantly made an impact, starting in seven games and was one of the Pirates' premier return specialists. As a sophomore, he became the team's lead back, starting all 11 games.Johnson's junior year was his worst as he only started in five games and rushed for 300 yards on the season. The next season he returned to his starting role, rushing for a career-high 1,423 yards and 17 touchdowns.In his four seasons at ECU, Johnson rushed for 2,982 yards and 32 touchdowns. Tennessee selected Johnson with the 24th overall pick in the 2008 NFL Draft and he instantly made an impact. As a rookie, he was one of the league's top running backs finishing with 1,228 yards and nine touchdowns.Johnson's second year in the NFL is regarded as one of the best ever by a running back in the league. With a career-high 358 carries, he ran for 2,006 yards and 14 touchdowns. He also caught 50 passes for 503 yards, making him the only running back in NFL history with over 2,000 yards rushing and 500 receiving yards in the same season.From 2008 to 2013, Johnson played for the Titans, rushing for at least 1,000 yards in each of his seasons with the team. He would go on to play for the Jets and Cardinals in his final four seasons.Johnson finished his NFL career with 9,651 rushing yards and 55 touchdowns on the ground. This article originally appeared on USA TODAY: Chris Johnson's rise from high school track star to NFL great

PNB, Canara, BoB and Indian Bank hand over Rs 9,439 crore dividend to centre - Check details
description: PNB, Canara Bank, Bank of Baroda and Indian Bank together paid Rs 9,439 crore in FY26 dividends to the government, reflecting strong financial performance and continued profitability across public sector lenders.
content: Public sector lenders Punjab National Bank (PNB), Canara Bank, Bank of Baroda (BoB) and Indian Bank together paid a dividend of Rs 9,439 crore to the government for the financial year 2025-26 on Monday, PTI reported. PNB MD & CEO Ashok Chandra presented a dividend cheque of Rs 2,416 crore for FY 2025-26 to Finance Minister Nirmala Sitharaman in the presence of Financial Services Secretary Sanjay Lohiya, the bank said in a post on X. Newly appointed Canara Bank MD and CEO Brajesh Kumar Singh also presented a dividend cheque of Rs 2,397 crore to the Finance Minister during the day. For the financial year 2025-26, Canara Bank declared a dividend of 4.2 per share, representing 210 per cent of the face value of Rs 2 each, the lender said in a statement. The dividend payout is a testament to Canara Bank's strong financial performance and its ongoing commitment to creating long-term value for all stakeholders, including its majority stakeholder, the Government of India, PTI quoted the bank's statement. In its statement, BoB said the bank's MD and CEO, Debadatta Chand, presented a dividend cheque of Rs 2,811 crore to the Finance Minister.  For 2025-26, the bank declared a dividend of Rs 8.50 per equity share, representing 425 per cent of the face value of Rs 2 each.Indian Bank's MD and CEO, Binod Kumar, handed over a dividend cheque of Rs 1,815.05 crore to the Finance Minister, as per PTI. Indian Bank remains committed to supporting the Government of India's vision of Viksit Bharat by driving inclusive growth through fostering banking and enhanced financial inclusion, the Chennai-based lender said in a statement. The bank has continued to maintain healthy growth across key business segments while strengthening its asset quality, operational efficiency, and customer-centric initiatives, it added. (With Agency Inputs)(Disclaimer: The above article is meant for informational purposes only, and should not be considered as any investment advice. ET NOW DIGITAL suggests its readers/audience to consult their financial advisors before making any money related decisions.)

Jeep to launch Chinese 4x4 flagship and two small SUVs in Europe
description:
Two smaller SUVs will use new Stellantis platform; 4x4 flagship will be a Dongfeng production


American brand rethinks its European strategy as it primes a line-up of five multi-energy models by 2030

Jeep will overhaul its European product line-up with the launch of three new models in the next four years, including two small crossovers developed specifically for the region and a new large SUV co-developed with Chinese firm Dongfeng.
The three new cars, which will all be multi-energy models and have a four-wheel drive option, will sit alongside the existing Avenger compact crossover and mid-sized Compass, with the goal of helping the American brand substantially grow its European sales.
Jeep is part of the Stellantis empire and one of its four designated ‘global’ brands, which means it will take priority in terms of product investment.
But while Jeep’s European strategy has previously focused on models taken from its core American range (joined by the occasional regional addition such as the Avenger), it will now develop a largely bespoke line-up – potentially with the Compass as its only model also sold in the US.
Fabio Catone, Jeep’s European boss, said that the three new arrivals would all build on the brand’s existing design pillars of capability, protection and versatility, and offer 4x4 ability.
He vowed they would represent what “makes a Jeep a Jeep, so the values, the product formula, the off-road heritage and our unique design language – at the end of the day, our identity”.
Small SUVs to focus on key Euro market
Jeep’s two new B-segment SUVs will sit above the existing Avenger, with one being described as "compact" and the other as "large".
Catone said that while the Avenger is positioned to win over buyers of B-segment hatchbacks, the compact B-SUV will be “wider, much more SUV-style”, while the larger B-SUV will be closer in size to the C-segment, which means it will sit just below the existing Compass.

Both will sit on the new STLA One platform that Stellantis is introducing across its brands and both will be manufactured in Europe.
Jeep has traditionally had mixed fortunes developing cars specifically for Europe: the Renegade compact SUV sold well but lacked the authentic off-road capability the brand was known for, while the Avenger is currently its best-seller and a former Car of the Year award winner.
“Jeep is a global brand with values that are shared all over the world,” said Catone. “The product formula is the same all over the world, but we are a global company with strong regional tools, and so we are developing a line-up that is strongly oriented to European customers’ needs.”
Catone hinted that the next-generation STLA One platform is being developed to ensure Jeep can deliver the four-wheel-drive ability that it's known for: “It’s not that we are developing on something [that is] existing that we have to adapt; we are working on something new. It's a shared platform globally, but we have the opportunity to create these cars from scratch, so we can implement all of our requirements as a Jeep.
“We are very confident that we will be able to deliver a true Jeep experience and benefit from the manufacturing and the industrial efficiency of the co-operation within the group.”
Catone said that the new platform is being engineered to ensure that the 4WD of the new Jeeps will be able to offer “best-in-class” off-road ability, with “specific investments” being made to offer the technical ability and approach and departure angles requited.
He hinted that could mean the new Jaapes will feature technology that will be enabled on STLA One such as steer-by-wire, which is being introduced by sister brand Peugeot in its future line-up.
Chinese joint venture to supply new flagship
Jeep’s new large SUV will be produced in a joint venture with Chinese firm Dongfeng, which is already partnering with Stellantis on a pair of new global Peugeot models.
Catone said the new machine, which will be built in China on a Dongfeng platform, will feature a design entirely set by Jeep and will still be engineered for off-road ability.
He described it as a “global Jeep project that will be sold in China and other regions, including Europe” but insisted it's a “vehicle fully designed by Jeep”.
He said it's similar to “an iPhone model, in which the technical features of the design are fully lined with the identity of the brand but we leverage on the industrial footprint”.
The D-SUV will also be multi-energy, with a plug-in hybrid option that's likely to be based on Dongfeng’s range-extender technology.
The Chinese company recently established M-Hero as a similarly positioned off-road brand, which is a likely candidate to provide the basis for Jeep's new European flagship.
M-Hero was launched in 2023 with the 917, a relatively extreme off-roader, and followed it up last year with the M817 (below), a 5.1m-long family SUV with rugged styling and four-wheel drive. 

Available in China with either a PHEV or a REx drivetrain and up to 900bhp combined, the M817 bears a strong resemblance to the D-SUV silhouette shown in Jeep's strategy presentation and would seem best placed for sale in Europe as a rival to the Land Rover Defender and Toyota Land Cruiser.
Jeep briefly offered the large, American-built Grand Cherokee in Europe but ditched that more upmarket model due to slow sales.
Asked if a large Jeep could find success in Europe, Catone said: “The D-SUV marked in Europe for us is a white space, and globally it’s a very strong pillar for Jeep. Our position is to add a strong D-SUV proposition, and we found this a strong opportunity with Dongfeng.”
Jeep currently doesn't sell the fabled Wrangler 4x4 in Europe, due to emissions regulations, and Catone said the firm is still looking for a way to reintroduce it in the future.
No mention was made of the US-built Recon and Wagoneer S electric SUVs, which suggests that an earlier plan to bring them here has been put on ice.

title: Indian Mango Festival Draws 8,000 People in the US But What's the Buzz All About?
description: The Indian Mango Festival in Washington, DC, drew over 8,000 visitors, celebrating India's beloved mango varieties, rich culinary heritage, and the growing popularity of Indian mangoes and food in the United States.
content: If you think people only queue for the latest food trend or a viral pop-up, think again. In Washington, D.C., thousands of people happily stood in line for something far simpler, a slice of perfectly ripe Indian mango.What Is The Indian Mango Festival?The annual Indian Mango Festival, hosted by the Embassy of India in the US under the theme Taste the Tropical Magic, turned into one of the city's biggest summer food events this year. More than 8,000 people registered to attend, and the turnout exceeded expectations, with long queues continuing until the festival came to a close. The overwhelming response wasn't just about satisfying a sweet tooth, it was a celebration of India's rich culinary heritage and the growing love affair Americans are having with Indian produce.Visitors sampled some of India's most-loved mango varieties, including Kesar, Langra and Malda, each bringing its own distinct flavour and aroma to the table. But the festival was about much more than mangoes. Guests were also treated to biryani, creamy lassi, mango halwa, Indian tea and coffee, turning the event into a vibrant showcase of Indian cuisine rather than a simple fruit tasting.For many Indian-Americans, the festival was an emotional trip down memory lane. Some travelled from neighbouring Virginia and Maryland just to relive childhood summers spent eating mangoes with family. One attendee recalled how her grandmother would eagerly wait for mango season every year, while another visitor declared Kesar to be the best mango he had tasted during his travels across the United States. Food, after all, has a remarkable way of bringing back memories.How It Became The Washington Summer Tradition The festival has quietly grown into a Washington summer tradition. Last year, organisers had just one mango tasting booth. This year, there were five, reflecting the event's soaring popularity and the increasing demand for Indian mangoes in the United States. Indian Ambassador Vinay Mohan Kwatra said the response was so encouraging that the embassy is now considering organising food promotion events more than once a year and expanding the range of Indian products on offer.Behind the cheerful atmosphere lies a bigger success story. Indian mangoes are becoming an increasingly valuable export. According to the Agriculture and Processed Food Products Export Promotion Authority (APEDA), India exported around 2,300 tonnes of mangoes to the US last year. Remarkably, officials say that figure had already been surpassed well before this year's mango season ended, highlighting the fruit's rapidly growing popularity among American consumers. Exporters also credit faster logistics and improved cold-chain systems for helping fresh mangoes reach US markets in excellent condition.Indian mangoes haven't always been easy to find in America. Until 2006, the US prohibited imports due to concerns over the mango seed weevil. The ban was lifted after India adopted irradiation treatment that met American phytosanitary standards, paving the way for beloved varieties such as Alphonso, Kesar and Langra to reach US shelves. Nearly two decades later, those efforts are paying off as demand continues to climb.Perhaps that's what made this year's Indian Mango Festival so special. It wasn't merely about tasting a fruit often called the "King of Fruits." It was about celebrating a season that millions of Indians grow up waiting for, introducing those flavours to new audiences, and proving that sometimes the simplest foods create the biggest buzz. Judging by the crowds in Washington, Indian mangoes have found a permanent place on American summer menus—and they're only getting sweeter with time.

title: Quantum computing startup says it will leapfrog everybody
description: But the system would require a massive leap from any of its existing hardware.
content:
A short time back, we covered an announcement by Amazon that it would be hosting a useful quantum computer from its partner QuEra as soon as sometime in 2028. The system promised some eye-popping numbers compared to anything on the market today: over 10,000 individual qubits, each with an error rate low enough that the system could support hundreds of error-corrected logical qubits. But QuEra has to get there from its current hardware, which sits at 260 qubits that are relatively error-prone.
Those details about how it was going to get there were left for last Wednesday, when QuEra announced its roadmap. But the announcement only accentuated the gap: There will be no new hardware releases between now and the useful machine, and QuEra is promising to deliver an even more powerful machine just one year later.
"The company made a strategic decision not to sell NISQ [noisy intermediate scale quantum] systems anymore," QuEra's Yuval Borger told Ars. The two systems it had previously made available have similar capabilities, with about 250 hardware qubits and an appreciable error rate—enough to test some error correction codes, but not sufficient for using logical qubits in applications.Read full article

title: జూలై 1న హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ జీపీసీ 2.0 కి శంకుస్థాపన చేయనున్న సీఎం
description: Chandrababu Naidu : ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ పారిశ్రామిక ప్రగతి, ఉపాధి కల్పనలో కూటమి ప్రభుత్వం మరో భారీ మైలురాయిని అధిగమించబోతోంది. ప్రముఖ ద్విచక్ర వాహన తయారీ దిగ్గజం ‘హీరో...
content:
Chandrababu Naidu : ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ పారిశ్రామిక ప్రగతి, ఉపాధి కల్పనలో కూటమి ప్రభుత్వం మరో భారీ మైలురాయిని అధిగమించబోతోంది. ప్రముఖ ద్విచక్ర వాహన తయారీ దిగ్గజం ‘హీరో మోటోకార్ప్’ (Hero MotoCorp) ప్రతిష్టాత్మకంగా నిర్మించనున్న గ్లోబల్ పార్ట్స్ సెంటర్ (GPC 2.0) ప్రాజెక్టుకు రాష్ట్ర ముఖ్యమంత్రి నారా చంద్రబాబు నాయుడు రాబోయే జూలై 1వ తేదీన అధికారికంగా శంకుస్థాపన చేయనున్నారు. తిరుపతి జిల్లా సత్యవేడు మండల పరిధిలోని మదనపాలెం వేదికగా హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ నూతనంగా ఏర్పాటు చేయనున్న ఈ భారీ గ్లోబల్ పార్ట్స్ సెంటర్‌కు సీఎం చంద్రబాబు నాయుడు భూమిపూజ నిర్వహించనున్నారు.



ఈ మెగా ప్రాజెక్టు ద్వారా రాష్ట్రంలో పారిశ్రామిక హబ్‌గా ఉత్తర తమిళనాడు, దక్షిణ ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ సరిహద్దులు మరింత బలోపేతం కానున్నాయి.



Read Also: గిరిజన హక్కుల కోసమే పవన్ ఆ శాఖ తీసుకున్నారు.. నాగబాబు



రూ.750 కోట్ల పెట్టుబడి – 4,000 మందికి ఉద్యోగ ఉపాధి అవకాశాలు



హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ సంస్థకు చెందిన దేశ, విదేశాల్లోని వివిధ తయారీ కేంద్రాలకు, ప్రపంచవ్యాప్తంగా ఉన్న డీలర్లకు అత్యాధునిక ద్విచక్ర వాహనాల విడి భాగాలను (Spare Parts) తయారు చేసి, నిరంతరం సరఫరా చేసేలా అంతర్జాతీయ ప్రమాణాలతో ఈ జీపీసీ (GPC) హబ్‌ను ఏర్పాటు చేస్తున్నారు. రూ.750 కోట్ల భారీ పెట్టుబడితో హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ ఈ సరికొత్త ‘జీపీసీ 2.0’ టెక్నాలజీ హబ్‌ను నిర్మించనుంది. ఈ మెగా పరిశ్రమ ద్వారా స్థానిక రాయలసీమ మరియు నెల్లూరు పరిసర ప్రాంతాలకు చెందిన దాదాపు 4,000 మంది నిరుద్యోగ యువతీ యువకులకు ప్రత్యక్షంగా, పరోక్షంగా ఉద్యోగ, ఉపాధి అవకాశాలు లభించనున్నాయి.



ఇప్పటికే తిరుపతి జిల్లా శ్రీసిటీ (Sri City) పారిశ్రామిక కారిడార్ సమీపంలో హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ సంస్థ ఏర్పాటు చేసిన అధునాతన ద్విచక్ర వాహనాల తయారీ ప్లాంట్‌లో ఏడాదికి 1.5 మిలియన్ల (15 లక్షలు) వాహనాల ఉత్పత్తి విజయవంతంగా జరుగుతోంది. దీనికి కొనసాగింపుగా.. దేశ, విదేశాల్లో మార్కెట్ ఉన్న హీరో మోటార్ సైకిళ్లు, స్కూటర్లతో పాటు భవిష్యత్తు ఇంధన వనరులైన ఎలక్ట్రిక్ వాహనాల (EVs) విడి భాగాలను అత్యంత నాణ్యతతో తయారు చేసేందుకు గానూ ఈ నూతన జీపీసీను హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ ఇక్కడ నెలకొల్పుతోంది.



‘హీరోస్ ఆఫ్ టుమారో’ స్కాలర్‌షిప్ ఆవిష్కరణ – ఏపీ పోలీసులకు ఈవీ వాహనాలు



పారిశ్రామిక వికాసంతో పాటు సామాజిక బాధ్యత (CSR) మరియు ‘పీ4’ (P4 – Public Private People Partnership) కార్యక్రమంలో భాగంగా నిరుపేద విద్యార్థులకు భారీగా స్కాలర్‌షిప్‌లను అందజేయాలని హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ యాజమాన్యం నిర్ణయించింది. ఈ మేరకు స్వర్ణాంధ్ర ఫౌండేషన్ (Swarnandhra Foundation) సహకారంతో హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ వ్యవస్థాపకులు బ్రిజ్ మోహన్ లాల్ ముంజల్ జ్ఞాపకార్థం అందించనున్న ‘హీరోస్ ఆఫ్ టుమారో’ (Heroes of Tomorrow) ప్రత్యేక స్కాలర్‌షిప్ పథకాన్ని ఈ వేదికపై ముఖ్యమంత్రి చంద్రబాబు నాయుడు అధికారికంగా ఆవిష్కరించనున్నారు.



దీనితో పాటు ఆంధ్రప్రదేశ్ రాష్ట్ర పోలీస్ శాఖ శాంతిభద్రతల పరిరక్షణకు, హైవే పెట్రోలింగ్‌కు వినియోగించుకునేలా హీరో మోటోకార్ప్ సంస్థ ప్రత్యేక సాంకేతికతతో డిజైన్ చేసిన ఎలక్ట్రిక్ మొబిలిటీ (EV) పోలీస్ వాహనాలను కూడా ముఖ్యమంత్రి చేతుల మీదుగా పోలీసు ఉన్నతాధికారులకు అందజేయనున్నారు.







Chandrababu Naidu : పున్నపువారిపాలెంలో ‘పేదల సేవలో’ సీఎం – రూ.2750 కోట్ల పెన్షన్ల పంపిణీ



పారిశ్రామిక కార్యక్రమాల అనంతరం ముఖ్యమంత్రి చంద్రబాబు నాయుడు పొరుగునే ఉన్న నెల్లూరు జిల్లాలో పర్యటించనున్నారు. నెల్లూరు జిల్లా చిల్లకూరు మండలం పరిధిలోని పున్నపువారిపాలెం గ్రామంలో అత్యంత ప్రతిష్టాత్మకంగా నిర్వహించనున్న ‘పేదల సేవలో’ (Pedala Sevalo) అధికారిక కార్యక్రమంలో సీఎం పాల్గొననున్నారు. దీంట్లో భాగంగా రాష్ట్రవ్యాప్తంగా నూతనంగా సవరించిన ‘ఎన్టీఆర్ భరోసా’ (NTR Bharosa Pensions) సామాజిక భద్రత పెన్షన్లను పంపిణీ చేయనున్నారు. వృద్ధాప్య, వితంతు, దివ్యాంగులతో సహా వివిధ కేటగిరీలకు చెందిన మొత్తం 62 లక్షల మంది లబ్ధిదారులకు ఒకే రోజు ఏకంగా రూ.2,750 కోట్ల మేర పెన్షన్ సొమ్మును ప్రభుత్వం పంపిణీ చేయనుంది.



పున్నపువారిపాలెం గ్రామంలోని ఒక నిరుపేద లబ్ధిదారుడి ఇంటికి నేరుగా వెళ్లనున్న ముఖ్యమంత్రి చంద్రబాబు నాయుడు.. స్వయంగా తన చేతుల మీదుగా పెన్షన్ డబ్బులను అందించి లబ్ధిదారుల యోగక్షేమాలను అడగనున్నారు. అనంతరం గ్రామంలోనే ఏర్పాటు చేసిన భారీ ‘ప్రజావేదిక’ బహిరంగ సభలో ముఖ్యమంత్రి ప్రజలను ఉద్దేశించి ప్రసంగిస్తారు. పర్యటన అనంతరం రాత్రికి శ్రీసిటీ (Sri City) లోనే ఉన్న అధికారిక విఐపి అతిథి గృహంలో ముఖ్యమంత్రి చంద్రబాబు నాయుడు బస చేయనున్నారు. ఇందుకోసం జిల్లా కలెక్టర్లు, ఎస్పీలు పటిష్టమైన భద్రతా ఏర్పాట్లు పర్యవేక్షిస్తున్నారు.

title: '‌അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാന്റെ പരമാധികാരത്തിന്മേലുള്ള കടന്നുകയറ്റം'; പാകിസ്ഥാൻ്റെ ആക്രമണത്തെ ശക്തമായി അപലപിച്ച് ഇന്ത്യ
description: അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാനിൽ നടത്തിയ ആക്രമണത്തിൽ പാകിസ്ഥാനെതിരെ ഇന്ത്യ. പാകിസ്ഥാൻ്റെ നടപടി അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാന്റെ പരമാധികാരത്തിന്മേലുള്ള കടന്നുകയറ്റമാണെന്ന് കേന്ദ്ര വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രാലയം പുറത്തിറക്കിയ പ്രസ്താവനയിൽ പറഞ്ഞു.
content: <p>ദില്ലി: പാകിസ്ഥാൻ അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാനിൽ നടത്തിയ ആക്രമണത്തെ ശക്തമായി അപലപിച്ച് ഇന്ത്യ. പാകിസ്ഥാൻ്റെ നടപടി അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാന്റെ പരമാധികാരത്തിന്മേലുള്ള കടന്നുകയറ്റവും പ്രാദേശിക സമാധാനത്തിനും സ്ഥിരതയ്ക്കും നേരിട്ടുള്ള ഭീഷണിയുമാണെന്ന് കേന്ദ്ര വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രാലയം വ്യക്തമാക്കി. ആഭ്യന്തര പരാജയങ്ങളിൽനിന്ന് ശ്രദ്ധ തിരിക്കാൻ വേണ്ടിയാണ് അയൽരാജ്യങ്ങളെ ആക്രമിക്കുന്നതെന്നും വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രാലയം പുറത്തിറക്കിയ പ്രസ്താവനയിൽ ചൂണ്ടിക്കാട്ടി.</p><p>സ്ത്രീകളും കുട്ടികളും ഉൾപ്പെടെ നിരവധി സാധാരണക്കാരുടെ മരണത്തിന് ഇടയാക്കിയ, അഫ്ഗാൻ പ്രദേശത്തെ പാകിസ്ഥാന്റെ വ്യോമാക്രമണത്തെ ഇന്ത്യ ശക്തമായി അപലപിക്കുന്നു. പാകിസ്ഥാന്റെ ഈ നഗ്നമായ അധിനിവേശ നടപടി അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാന്റെ പരമാധികാരത്തിന്മേലുള്ള കടന്നുകയറ്റവും പ്രാദേശിക സമാധാനത്തിനും സ്ഥിരതയ്ക്കും നേരിട്ടുള്ള ഭീഷണിയുമാണ്. ഇത് പാകിസ്ഥാന്റെ തുടർച്ചയായതും ലാഘവത്തോടെ ഉള്ളതുമായ പെരുമാറ്റരീതിയെയാണ് പ്രതിഫലിപ്പിക്കുന്നതെന്ന് വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രാലയം പറഞ്ഞു.</p><p>തങ്ങളുടെ ആഭ്യന്തര പരാജയങ്ങളിൽനിന്ന് ശ്രദ്ധ തിരിക്കാൻ അതിർത്തികൾക്കപ്പുറത്ത് അക്രമങ്ങൾ നടത്താനുള്ള പാകിസ്ഥാന്റെ വ്യർത്ഥമായ ശ്രമമാണിത്. പ്രിയപ്പെട്ടവരെ നഷ്ടപ്പെട്ട അഫ്ഗാൻ കുടുംബങ്ങൾക്ക് ഇന്ത്യ അനുശോചനം അറിയിക്കുന്നു. പരിക്കേറ്റവർ എത്രയും വേഗം സുഖം പ്രാപിക്കട്ടെ എന്ന് പ്രാർത്ഥിക്കുന്നതിനൊപ്പം അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാന്റെ പരമാധികാരത്തിനും പ്രാദേശിക സമഗ്രതയ്ക്കും വേണ്ടിയുള്ള ഇന്ത്യയുടെ അചഞ്ചലമായ പിന്തുണ ആവർത്തിച്ച് വ്യക്തമാക്കുന്നതായും കേന്ദ്ര വിദേശകാര്യ മന്ത്രാലയം വ്യക്തമാക്കി.</p><p>പാകിസ്ഥാൻ നടത്തിയ ആക്രമണത്തിൽ 36 സാധാരണക്കാർ കൊല്ലപ്പെടുകയും 160ലധികം പേർക്ക് പരിക്കേൽക്കുകയും ചെയ്തതായി അഫ്ഗാൻ അധികൃതർ അറിയിച്ചതിന് പിന്നാലെയാണ് ആക്രമണത്തെ ഇന്ത്യ ശക്തമായി അപലപിച്ചത്. പക്തിയ, പക്തിക, കുനാർ എന്നീ പ്രവിശ്യകളിലാണ് പാകിസ്ഥാൻ ആക്രമണം നടത്തിയത്. പാകിസ്ഥാൻ്റേത് ഭീരുത്വം നിറഞ്ഞ അധിനിവേശ നടപടി എന്നും ക്രൂരത എന്നും അഫ്ഗാനിസ്ഥാൻ അപലപിച്ചു. ആക്രമണത്തിന് അടുത്ത സമയം തന്നെ കാബൂൾ മറുപടി നൽകുമെന്ന് ഉദ്യോഗസ്ഥർ മുന്നറിയിപ്പ് നൽകി. പാകിസ്ഥാനിൽ നടത്തിയ ഭീകരാക്രമണത്തിന് മറുപടിയെന്നോണമാണ് ആക്രമണം നടത്തിയതെന്നാണ് ഭരണകൂടത്തിൻ്റെ വിശദീകരണം.</p>

Stade Shooting Germany: Video Of Police Detaining Suspect Surfaces; First Details On Possible Motive Out
description: Authorities say six adults were killed in the Stade shooting, three people are in custody, and investigators are examining what they describe as a possible personal or family-related motive.
content: Six people have died after a shooting at a youth care facility in Stade, Germany, with police confirming the suspected gunman has been detained. Investigators believe the attack may have been driven by a personal dispute connected to the facility.What We Know So Far About Suspects, Victims, And Possible MotiveA shooting near a youth care facility in Stade, Lower Saxony, turned deadly on Monday, leaving six adults dead and several others injured.Police first said five people had died at the scene. Later, they confirmed that a sixth victim died in the hospital after suffering injuries in the attack. Several other people were hurt, some seriously, although authorities have not released the exact number of injured.Video shared online captures the suspected shooter being taken into custody shortly after the incident. Police have confirmed that three people are being held, including the suspected gunman. Earlier, authorities had said two suspects, a man and a woman, both over the age of 21, had been detained. The role of the third person remains under investigation.  BREAKING: Video captures the suspect being taken into custody following the deadly shooting in Stade, Germany. Authorities now confirm the death toll has risen to six. pic.twitter.com/xWDA3H0Xe4— Breaking911 (@Breaking911) June 29, 2026 The shooting happened near a youth welfare center in Stade's city center. The facility provides temporary accommodation for pregnant women and young mothers with children, while mother-and-child residential groups are also located nearby.According to information obtained by SPIEGEL, investigators believe the shooting was a "crime of passion" with personal links to the youth facility. A spokesperson for the Lüneburg police also described the incident as appearing to be an "extended family tragedy."Investigators say there is currently no indication that the shooting was politically or ideologically motivated. Police also said it does not appear to be a case of femicide, adding that the suspected motive seems to be rooted in the environment of the youth welfare center.   https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=sJdYWzlrkscCity Councillor Carsten Brokelmann said the shooting took place close to a daycare center and a primary school. He said he was relieved that children and staff at both facilities were safe, while extending his sympathies to the victims and their families.Police and emergency crews responded to the scene in large numbers and asked residents to stay away from the area during the operation. Authorities have since confirmed there is no ongoing danger to the public.
